name: ERPNext Stock V2 E2E Exception Return Warranty Lifecycle Test

parameters.dataJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ customer_name: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.customerName, customer_type: "Company", customer_group: "Individual", territory: "Vietnam" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ item_group_name: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.itemGroup, parent_item_group: "All Item Groups", is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.sellWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.warrantyWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.defectWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.repairWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.itemCode, item_name: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.itemCode, item_group: $node["Create Return Item Group"].json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 1, valuation_rate: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.rate, standard_rate: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.rate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Receipt", company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.postingDate, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Return Item"].json.name, t_warehouse: $node["Create Sellable Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.receiptQty, basic_rate: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.rate }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $node["Create Return Customer"].json.name, company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.postingDate, due_date: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.dueDate, update_stock: 1, set_warehouse: $node["Create Sellable Warehouse"].json.name, debit_to: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.accounts.receivable, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Return Item"].json.name, warehouse: $node["Create Sellable Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.saleQty, rate: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.rate, income_account: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.accounts.sales }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $node["Create Return Customer"].json.name, company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.postingDate, due_date: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.dueDate, update_stock: 1, is_return: 1, return_against: $node["Submit Stock Sales Invoice"].json.name, set_warehouse: $node["Create Warranty Warehouse"].json.name, debit_to: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.accounts.receivable, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Return Item"].json.name, warehouse: $node["Create Warranty Warehouse"].json.name, qty: -$node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.returnQty, rate: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.rate, income_account: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.accounts.sales }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Transfer", company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.postingDate, from_warehouse: $node["Create Warranty Warehouse"].json.name, to_warehouse: $node["Create Defect Warehouse"].json.name, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Return Item"].json.name, s_warehouse: $node["Create Warranty Warehouse"].json.name, t_warehouse: $node["Create Defect Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.returnQty, basic_rate: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.rate }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Transfer", company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.postingDate, from_warehouse: $node["Create Defect Warehouse"].json.name, to_warehouse: $node["Create Repair Warehouse"].json.name, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Return Item"].json.name, s_warehouse: $node["Create Defect Warehouse"].json.name, t_warehouse: $node["Create Repair Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.returnQty, basic_rate: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.rate }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Issue", company: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.postingDate, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Return Item"].json.name, s_warehouse: $node["Create Repair Warehouse"].json.name, qty: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.returnQty, basic_rate: $node["Build E2E Exception Context"].json.rate }] }) }}
